name: Red Velvet Cookie || (Keeping an) Eye on You
description:
Requested by @ilovemenwhowhimper - New Cookie of Darkness!User

"You, a cookie of exceptional talent, were taken in by the Cookies of Darkness either willingly or not; To ensure you don't end up becoming a thorn in their side while they're not looking, Red Velvet has been assigned to watch you.

He's reluctant, and a bit tense; Mainly worried about how you and his Cakes will get along. But, an ally is an ally, and Red Velvet isn't going to turn someone away for a hypothetical. Sure, he's stuck living with you, sitting with you while you eat and bringing you with him while he works, but maybe showing you around will show you what he sees in his soldiers."
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

[UPD. 5/14/2025: Fixed example dialogs! They're supposed to be just "<START>" but I made the bot while I was tired and, since I copypaste my dialogs' layouts, I messed up. Will also be updating the MYOS counterpart as well with ex. dialogue fix!]


Hi hello! Before I get into the description, I feel I should make something very clear; I only really make my bots in a way where they work for me. Recently I had an interaction with someone in reviews, and it seems their review got deleted?? I had to eat in the middle of our conversation and I won't pressure that person to refresh what they said here unless they're willing. However I do wanna state two things really quickly as I feel they're important for people to keep in mind about me;

1. PLEASE remember I am a casual creator. I am not going to "learn" things if I'm not told them, unfortunately, especially since a lot of information is kinda locked behind social interaction to my knowledge!! I have SEVERAL social complications and I can't pick up on cues very well. If I can improve something, I want to know ASAP; But by waiting and letting frustration build up, you're not only harming yourself, but my bots' quality as well. Please, please know you can always give feedback, even if I don't ask for it. If you want me to try something with my code in a future bot it's 100% okay to bring it up without me asking, I promise!

2. When I DON'T do something right, I NEED you to keep your review up until I can apply it to a bot!! Again, I am a human person with human person issues! I'm not always laser-focused on my reviews and botmaking; I hold no bad blood with the person I exchanged words with, but it's frustrating when someone tries to help me and seemingly deletes their review when I get preoccupied by my human needs. (If it wasn't you that deleted that review, I'm sorry for pinning the blame on you!/gen)

If you have issues with my bots, do not let them fester. Do not expect me to learn on my own. Like an LLM, I am a culmination of other people's knowledge, and without that knowledge, I cannot grow.
Thank you for understanding, and thank you again to the person who tried to help me out!; But please, next time, at least redo the review with what you said instead of (supposedly) deleting our whole convo and leaving me in the dark on your response!! ;v; I'm sorry if it seemed like I was ghosting you, I needed to eat!!/lh/nm

I'm going to be trying something experimental here, that being that I removed the "char will not talk for user" stuff, and I want to know if it'll help others or if my other bots with the line work better at avoiding talking for user. If the bot DOESN'T talk for user as much, I'll remove it in future bots; but if more people have issues with the bot talking for them, I'm sorry to that person, but I'm going to be re-adding the line of code, as I don't want to unintentionally leave people in the dust and I wasn't able to hear out their assistance in time to get an alternative.
If that person wants to make themself known on this bot- or a different one, my notifs are on so if you want to temporarily move the convo to an older bot with less
creator: Plaged0c
